---
title: "Cryptography & Game Theory"
description: "Blockchain incentives, MEV, DeFi games, cryptographic protocols analyzed as strategic interactions."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="cryptography-and-gt"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Cryptography & Game Theory</h1>
  <p class="lead">Blockchain incentives, MEV, DeFi games, cryptographic protocols analyzed as strategic interactions.</p>
</div>
```
